name: Koko
intro: This spiced and fermented millet porridge is a Hausa dish that is mostly eaten in the northern part of the country. This porridge is great for breakfast or as a light meal at any time of the day. For maximum enjoyment, eat it alongside Akara/ Kosai (page 135) or Masa (page 175).

ingredients.item: whole cloves 1/4 cup sliced fresh ginger

method: Place the millet, 3 cups of water, cloves and sliced ginger in a blender and blend for several minutes until very smooth. Blend at intervals to prevent your blender motor from overheating.
Serve on its own or with a side of Akara/Kosai (page 135) or Masa (page 175).
